Queen_Bee.description: A Queen Bee that can be used for making Honeycomb or for breeding more bees.
Queen_Bee.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Rock_Golem_Fragment.description: A piece of matter taken from the body of a great beast.

Rock_Golem_Core.description: A piece of matter taken from the body of a great beast.

Rock_Golem_Sledgehammer.description: A Sledgehammer crafted from the spoils of victory against a Quarrite.
Rock_Golem_Sledgehammer.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Rock_Golem_Gun.description: A Pneumatic Gun crafted from Quarrite materials. Launches stones which shatter on impact.
Rock_Golem_Gun.flavorText: You\'ve heard of fighting fire with fire...

Rock_Golem_Attachment.description: An attachment that grants damage reduction and health regen.
Rock_Golem_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Rock_Golem_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Quarrite Creature.

Rock_Golem_Trophy.description: A preserved specimen from a Quarrite that once lived on Icarus.
Rock_Golem_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rock_Golem_Trophy_Lamp.description: A monument to a great creature, which emits a small red light. Has 3 variations.
Rock_Golem_Trophy_Lamp.flavorText: What a great use for the core of a ferocious beast.

Rock_Golem_Chair.description: Evidence that a Quarrite was bested.
Rock_Golem_Chair.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Rock_Golem_Grenade.description: Explodes into many sharp objects that damage and slow.
Rock_Golem_Grenade.flavorText: Like those little colored toy building blocks, but much much older.

Rock_Golem_Grenade_Caltrops.description: The sharp remains of a Quarrite Grenade. Will slow and cause damage when stepped on.
Rock_Golem_Grenade_Caltrops.flavorText: Like those little colored toy building blocks, but much much older.

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Gold.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Gold.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Exotic.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Exotic.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Copper.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Copper.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Oxite.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head_Oxite.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Juvenile_Rock_Golem_Trophy.flavorText: How did you stuff a creature made of rock?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Exotic.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Exotic.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Copper.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Copper.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?
